connectors.name: aws
connectors.description: AWS topology connector — discovers EC2 instances, ECS services + tasks, and EKS clusters + nodepools via the AWS SDK, then emits them as a Resource graph the gateway can merge with Kubernetes / service-mesh views. RUNS_ON edges link ECS tasks to EC2 hosts; OWNED_BY links ECS tasks to their services and EKS nodes to their clusters.

versions.changelog: Initial release: EC2 + ECS + EKS topology discovery. Snapshots memoized for 30s. Watch-mode delivers initial resync + periodic poll. Standard AWS SDK credential chain (env, IAM role, profile).

connectors.name: consul
connectors.description: HashiCorp Consul Connect service-mesh topology connector — reads Consul's catalog + intentions API. CALLS edges from inbound intentions; edge confidence reflects Action=allow vs deny.

versions.changelog: Initial release: Consul Connect topology via /v1/catalog/services + /v1/connect/intentions/match. Instance counts via /v1/health/service/<name> (capped at 50 services). 30s snapshot TTL. Optional X-Consul-Token auth.

connectors.name: datadog
connectors.description: Datadog connector — metrics via the v1 query API and logs via the v2 logs search API. The first optional, hub-installable connector.

versions.changelog: Initial release: metrics + logs, API/Application key auth, service discovery via the service tag.

connectors.name: elasticsearch
connectors.description: Elasticsearch connector — logs via _search and log-derived metrics (doc/error rate) via date_histogram aggregations. ECS-style fields, API-key or basic auth.

versions.changelog: Initial release: _search logs + date_histogram log-derived metrics, service-name aggregation discovery, API-key/basic auth, ES_INDEX pattern.

connectors.name: gcp
connectors.description: GCP topology connector — discovers Compute Engine instances, Cloud Run services, and GKE clusters + nodepools via the Google Cloud SDK. Auth via Application Default Credentials.

versions.changelog: Initial release: GCE + Cloud Run + GKE topology discovery. OWNED_BY edges link GKE nodepools to clusters. 30s snapshot TTL. Lazy SDK load — connector boots cleanly even when @google-cloud/* not installed (loader smoke contract).

connectors.name: grafana
connectors.description: Grafana connector — metrics from a Prometheus-compatible datasource and logs from a Loki datasource, queried through Grafana's datasource proxy behind Grafana auth.

versions.changelog: Initial release: Prometheus-proxied metrics + Loki-proxied logs via Grafana datasource proxy, auto datasource-UID resolution, service-account token auth.

connectors.name: istio
connectors.description: Istio service-mesh topology connector — derives a CALLS graph from istio_requests_total in the operator's existing Prometheus. Service names + namespaces from Istio telemetry-v2 labels (source_workload, destination_workload). Edge confidence reflects relative request volume so chatty edges rank above rare ones.

versions.changelog: Initial release: Istio service-mesh CALLS graph via istio_requests_total Prometheus metric. Snapshots memoized 30s. Auth via optional Bearer token.

connectors.name: kubernetes
connectors.description: Watches a Kubernetes cluster (in-cluster or via kubeconfig) and exposes pods, nodes, deployments, replicasets and namespaces as an infrastructure topology graph. Edges: RUNS_ON (pod→node), OWNED_BY (pod→rs→deployment), IN_NAMESPACE. Built on @kubernetes/client-node Informers — no polling.

versions.changelog: Initial release: watch-based topology graph (pods, nodes, deployments, replicasets, namespaces) with incremental change events. Bundled with the server image — no install step.

connectors.name: linkerd
connectors.description: Linkerd service-mesh topology connector — derives a CALLS graph from response_total in the operator's existing Prometheus.

versions.changelog: Initial release: Linkerd service-mesh CALLS graph via response_total. 30s snapshot TTL. Optional Bearer auth.

connectors.name: loki
connectors.description: LogQL-based logs backend. Service discovery from log streams and label-scoped log queries.

versions.changelog: Bundled with the server image — no install step. Listed for discoverability and to anchor the catalog format.

connectors.name: prometheus
connectors.description: PromQL-based metrics backend. Service discovery, default metric set, and ad-hoc range/instant queries.

versions.changelog: Bundled with the server image — no install step. Listed for discoverability and to anchor the catalog format.

connectors.name: tempo
connectors.description: Grafana Tempo connector — OTLP-native tracing backend. Surfaces trace-derived service latency via the TraceQL search API and derives a service-graph (CALLS edges) by walking cross-service parent/child spans across a recent-trace sample.

versions.changelog: Adds queryTraces capability so the gateway's `query_traces` MCP tool returns real ranked trace summaries against the Tempo backend. Builds a TraceQL query (default `{ resource.service.name="X" }`, splices service-AND into caller-supplied filters), hits /api/search, then for the first 25 traces fetches /api/traces/:id to compute spanCount + hasError from OTLP status.code. Output matches gateway TraceResult shape exactly.

Adds topology capability: derives CALLS edges between services from a sampled batch of recent Tempo traces (default 50). Snapshots memoized for 30s. Sample size configurable via source config (`traceSample`).
Initial release: trace-derived service latency via Tempo TraceQL search, service discovery from resource.service.name tag, optional Bearer auth.
